blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
